ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument type */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the instrument (e.g., technology, finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the instrument (e.g., software, banking) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickers" (
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticker */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument type */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Security Identification Procedures (CUSIP) number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickers_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_quotes" (
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quote */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticker */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the quote */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  "adj_open" REAL /* Adjusted opening price */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "adj_high" REAL /* Adjusted highest price */,
  "adj_low" REAL /* Adjusted lowest price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_quotes_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_quotes_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume record */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticker */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the volume record */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  "turnover" REAL /* Turnover (total value of shares traded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pre_close_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticker */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "pre_close" REAL /* Pre-close price */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pre_close_prices_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pre_close_prices_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return record */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticker */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the return record */,
  "return" REAL /* Daily return */,
  "cumulative_return" REAL /* Cumulative return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_returns_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_returns_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "atr_values" (
  "atr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ATR record */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticker */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the ATR record */,
  "atr" REAL /* ATR value */,
  "tr" REAL /* True range (TR) */,
  "hl" REAL /* High-low (HL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("atr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_atr_values_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_atr_values_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the trade */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticker being traded */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the trade was executed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user holding the position */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticker in the position */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the position was opened */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares in the position */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the position was entered */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date the position was exited (if applicable) */,
  "entry_price" REAL /* Entry price of the position */,
  "exit_price" REAL /* Exit price of the position (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data record */,
  "index_value" REAL /* Value of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in the market index */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in the market index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticker related to the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticker related to the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., earnings call, dividend payment) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst rating */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticker related to the rating */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "price_target" REAL /* Price target given by the analyst */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insider_trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insider trade */,
  "ticker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticker related to the trade */,
  "insider_name" TEXT /* Name of the insider */,
  "relation" TEXT /* Relation of the insider to the company (e.g., CEO, CFO) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insider_trades_ticker_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_id") REFERENCES tickers ("ticker_id")
)
